title: Operations Associate
company_context: UK AI-enabled lettings & property-management platform growing via roll-up of estate agencies; automates tenant management, payments, maintenance with AI. Raised $93M Feb 2026 (General Catalyst), ~300 staff scaling toward 1,500.
momentum_flag: STRONG — $93M raise Feb 2026, aggressive headcount expansion (300→1,500), 8+ ops roles live simultaneously
biggest_lever: JD is a pure generalist-operator brief — 'run high-impact projects end-to-end, scale processes not built for our pace, build systems to run more agencies without adding headcount; fast-track to Operations Manager'. Mirrors Ryan's Minima FA→first-employee 'turn ambiguous priorities into workstreams' record exactly.
biggest_risk: Not core agentic-AI (AI-enabled proptech roll-up); high-volume real-world ops (agencies/landlords/payments) and the role is pitched at a development-pathway/earlier seniority, so comp and intellectual upside may sit below Ryan's £50k+ / agent-builder ambitions.
apply_move: Apply via Greenhouse today while fresh (day-0). Emphasise the 1→30 scale-up, fundraising-ops and 'built repeatable workflows' angle; position AI-agent skills as a way to automate Dwelly's integration/ops backlog.
availability_note: Re-verified LIVE via Greenhouse boards-api (dwelly) 2026-06-10; first_published 2026-06-08, updated 2026-06-09, only 2 days old. G_recency held at 88 (still day-0/1 band). callback_op unchanged 78.
why_fits_operator_intent: Textbook operations-generalist 'deployed where impact is highest' role with founder/experienced-operator exposure — operator-shaped, not sales/CS.
